results.rawText: cr.no is registered, but the owner has currently not an active website here. Other services, such as e-mail, may be actively used by the owner.

results.pageTitle: 'Rajapaksa Said Modi Insisted on Adani for Power Project', Says Sri Lanka Electricity Chief - The Wire

extractedData.headline: 'Rajapaksa Said Modi Insisted on Adani for Power Project', Says Sri Lanka Electricity Chief - The Wire
extractedData.summary: After Sri Lankan President Gotabaya Rajapaksa denied authorising the award of the project 'to any specific person or entity,' the CEB chief also retracted his claim.

results.pageTitle: Congress president Sonia Gandhi admitted to Ganga Ram hospital over Covid-related issues | Delhi News - The Indian Express

extractedData.headline: Congress president Sonia Gandhi admitted to Ganga Ram hospital over Covid-related issues | Delhi News - The Indian Express
extractedData.summary: Sonia Gandhi was diagnosed with Covid-19 10 days ago. Randeep Surjewala at the time said she had developed a mild fever, and some other symptoms, and had isolated herself.

extractedData.headline: M.K. Stalin: Reluctant leader - Frontline
extractedData.summary: In the past year, Stalin has deliberately underplayed his role at the national level, while trying to create an ideological base for the larger struggle against the BJP.
